name: Bullet Points
description: Convert any text into organized bullet points
author: TextFlow

name: Explain Code
description: Get a line-by-line explanation of any code snippet
author: TextFlow

name: Copy as Markdown
description: Convert selected or full-page HTML to clean Markdown and copy to clipboard
author: TextFlow

name: Dark Mode Toggle
description: Instantly toggle dark mode on any website using smart CSS inversion
author: TextFlow

name: Dictionary
description: Look up definitions, synonyms, and usage examples for any word
author: TextFlow

name: Explain
description: Break down complex text into simple, easy-to-understand language
author: TextFlow

name: Fix Grammar
description: Fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation errors inline
author: TextFlow

name: Highlight & Note
description: Highlight selected text in yellow and save it to your notes
author: TextFlow

name: JSON Prettify
description: Format and prettify JSON data with syntax highlighting
author: TextFlow

name: Quick Search
description: Search selected text on Google in a new tab instantly
author: TextFlow

name: Read Aloud
description: Read selected or full-page text aloud using the browser's speech engine
author: TextFlow

name: Rewrite in Tone
description: Rewrite selected text in a specific tone (Professional, Casual, Concise, Academic, or Creative)
author: TextFlow

name: Share via Email
description: Open an email draft with selected text and the source URL
author: TextFlow

name: Summarize
description: Condense any text into a clear, concise summary with key points
author: TextFlow

name: Lazy Translate Page
description: Translates all visible text on a webpage in batches with lazy loading on scroll, preserving UI and skipping code blocks
author: TextFlow

name: Word Count
description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimated reading time
author: TextFlow
